system.description:
### Tier 1 Bruiser A scaled, predatory beast with a massive jaw, often used as an attack dog by Krogans or pirates. Motives & Tactics: Charge, endure pain, feed

#### Features Leaping Charge - Action: The Varren moves to a target within Close range. The target must make a Strength Reaction Roll (14). On a failure, they take 4 phy damage and became Restrained.

Ignore the Pain - Reaction: When the Varren marks HP, it can spend 1 Stress to reduce the damage by 1.

Pack Frenzy - Passive: The Varren deals +2 damage if another Varren or ally is within Very Close range of its target.

}}

{{adversary,
